titleStmt.title: SII 39.232: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 232. (A.R. No. 232 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJADĒVA-6TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to a gift of Pāḍikāval right and other income of the devadāna villages for performing pūja in the same temple, by Āḻappiṟandāṉ Eḻiśaimōgaṉ alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa Kāḍavarāyaṉ for the merit of himself and his descendants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī rājarāja devaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu vaṭakarai virutarā
ja bhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkānāṭṭu Iruṅkoḷappāṭi
viḷantaikkūṟṟa tirumuṭṭam Uṭaiya mahādevaṟku Innāṭṭu U
ṟumurāna coḻapāṇṭiya catuppetimaṅkalamāna Eṟum
pūr kāṇi Uṭaiya paḷḷi Āṟappiṟantāṟ Ēḻicai mokanāta ku
lottuṅka coḻakkāṭavarāyanen Enakkum Enva
ṅcattārkkum naṉṟāka Uṭaiyyār tirumuṭaiya na
yinārkku pūcaikku Uṭalāka Ināyanār tevatānam
tiruvariyil Īṭṭinapaṭiyāl Uḷḷa Ūrkaḷil nānkoḷum
pāṭikāvalum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭinavum Innāyanārku pū
jaikku Uṭalāka śrī pātattey nirvārttu kuṭutten Āḷap
piṟantān Eḻicaimokan Āṉa kulottuṅka co
ḻakkāṭavarāyaneṉ Intanamma Eṉvaṅcattā
rum Encātiyil Uḷārum maṟṟum Āṟeṉum Ittaṉmam Aḻivu ce
yvār gaṅkai karaiyile koṭipacuk konṟāṉ pāvaṅkoḷvā
r vallavaraiyan cūṟaivaṭi Itu panmāheśvara
rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
